speaker: Petr Macinka
text: Trumpism is a justified reaction to woke/cancel culture, gender ideology, and climate alarmism that went too far from ordinary people; there are two genders, male and female, and the rest is a social construct.
context: Defending Trump while declining to fully endorse his Ukraine approach.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
